message.content:
Subject: Our Apologies for Your Delayed Order

Dear [Customer Name],

Thank you for reaching out, and I’m very sorry for the frustration this delay has caused. I understand how disappointing it is to be waiting longer than expected, and this is not the experience we want for you.

Unfortunately, your shipment was delayed due to an unexpected issue in our fulfillment process, which caused a backlog in outgoing orders. While this is an explanation, it’s not an excuse—we should have communicated more proactively and kept you updated on the status of your order.

Your order is now [on its way / scheduled to ship by ___], and your new estimated delivery date is [date]. As a gesture of our apology for the inconvenience, we would like to offer you [choose one based on your policy:  
– a [percentage]% discount on this order, refunded to your original method of payment once it’s delivered, or  
– a [percentage]% discount on your next purchase with the code: [CODE], valid until [date].]

Please let me know which option you prefer, and I will process it right away.

We truly appreciate your patience and your business, and we’re taking steps to prevent this from happening again. If you have any further questions or if there’s anything else we can do to make this right, you can reply directly to this email and I’ll be happy to help.

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Title]  
[Company Name]  
[Contact Information]
